EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICoordinateFrameTransformation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the 3D frame transformation with rotation, translation and scaling.

[Guid("0CDF92B2-C2A0-11D2-BD08-0000F875BCCE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICoordinateFrameTransformation : IGeoTransformation, ITransformation

Properties

Name 

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

GetParameters(out double, out double, out double, out double, out double, out double, out double)

Returns translation, rotation and scale values of the transformation.

void GetParameters(out double dx, out double dy, out double dz, out double rx, out double ry, out double rz, out double s)

dx double
dy double
dz double
rx double
ry double
rz double
s double

Sets translation, rotation and scale values for the transformation.
